Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Wait, no... This is something else. I've never sensed anything like it before![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I doubt it's just a regular Shadow, so if you decide to track it down, please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}
